title: Exit Liquidity - Hyperliquid Update
summary_title: Hyperliquid's $850M annual buyback: the perp dex that chose users over profits
summary_description: One year after launch, Hyperliquid burns 99% of fees buying back HYPE while dominating perp trading with exotic assets from Pokemon cards to pre-IPO companies.

key_moments.label: Hyperliquid TGE anniversary: HYPE token launched one year ago at $2
$850M in buybacks this year alone using 99% of protocol fees
Hyperliquid's speed: 100k TPS, 1-2 second finality vs Solana's 1500 TPS
Builder codes let wallets like Phantom and MetaMask embed perps, splitting revenue
HIP3 markets: third-party deployed perps on exotic assets like Counter-Strike skins
$17M HYPE collateral required to deploy new markets, enforcing quality control
Token unlock FUD: only 600k HYPE sold OTC, no massive dump on anniversary

pull_quote: They could have kept $400 million for themselves and still done a buyback. But they did 99%.
